evals.prompt: Run campaign-setup with: client_dir=Retreat House/Retreat House; mode=downstream; platforms=['google']; phase=1. Downstream mode: consume Retreat House paid-media-strategy + ad-copywriter + landing-page-builder outputs. Phase 1 = Google only. Expect 8 CSVs + checklist + runbook. 0 CRITICAL from validator.

assertions.name: placeholder_tokens
assertions.description: placeholder token count: >= 1 (account ID + conversion action names at minimum)

_original_expected_outputs.placeholder_tokens_expected: >= 1 (account ID + conversion action names at minimum)

evals.prompt: Run campaign-setup with: mode=standalone; client_type=SaaS B2B; platforms=['google', 'meta']. Standalone mode: no upstream deliverables. Skill asks 12-question intake. Expect Google + Meta CSVs with heavy <REPLACE_ME> annotations.

Run campaign-setup with: mode=test; headlines_over_limit=3; descriptions_over_limit=2. Inject ad copy that exceeds Google RSA 30-char / 90-char limits. Validator must flag every violation as CRITICAL.
Run campaign-setup with: mode=test; orphan_ad_groups=1; orphan_keywords=2. CSVs reference a campaign name that doesn't exist in 01-campaigns.csv. Validator must flag as CRITICAL.

assertions.name: validator_message_substring
assertions.description: validator output contains the substring `not found`

evals.prompt: Run campaign-setup with: mode=test; meta_pending_assets=4. Meta bulk CSV references <PENDING_UPLOAD> tokens because user hasn't uploaded assets yet. Validator must WARN (not CRITICAL) and block launch via checklist Section 0.

assertions.name: checklist_section_0_lists_pending
assertions.description: pre-launch-checklist Section 0 lists pending Meta assets

evals.prompt: Run campaign-setup with: 07-structured-snippets.csv emitted in per-column format (Value 1, Value 2, ...). Validator must CRITICAL-fail because Editor's parser rejects this format with 'There are too few values for a structured snippet.' Required format is single 'Snippet Values' column with semicolon-delimited values.

assertions.name: validator_critical_per_column_format
assertions.description: Validator output contains the phrase 'per-column Value 1/Value 2/... format' OR 'REJECTED by Ads Editor parser'

assertions.name: validator_suggests_semicolon_format
assertions.description: Validator output references 'Snippet Values' column with semicolon-delimited example (e.g. 'Vinyasa;Yin;Beginners')

assertions.name: schema_doc_updated
assertions.description: references/google-ads-editor-schema.md §7 documents the semicolon format and explicitly warns against the per-column format

evals.prompt: Run campaign-setup for a wellness/yoga client. Keyword set includes 'yoga for back pain sydney' (musculoskeletal pain), 'yoga for anxiety' (mental health), and 'weight loss program' (weight-loss claim). Google's Personalized Advertising Restrictions auto-reject these at Editor import. Validator must pre-filter and CRITICAL-fail per match before launch.

assertions.name: validator_flags_health_condition_keywords
assertions.description: Validator CRITICAL-fails 'yoga for back pain sydney' with category 'health-condition (musculoskeletal pain)' and suggests reframe (desk workers / mobility yoga)

assertions.name: validator_flags_mental_health_keywords
assertions.description: Validator CRITICAL-fails 'yoga for anxiety' with category 'mental-health condition' and suggests reframe (calming yoga / restorative yoga)

assertions.name: validator_flags_weight_loss_keywords
assertions.description: Validator CRITICAL-fails 'weight loss program' with category 'weight-loss claim' and suggests reframe (fitness program / body transformation)

assertions.name: negatives_exempt
assertions.description: Negative keyword variants of these patterns are NOT flagged — negatives SHOULD reference restricted terms to block irrelevant traffic

assertions.name: reference_doc_present
assertions.description: references/restricted-keyword-categories.md exists with full pattern catalog + sector-specific reframing recipes
